fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the warehouse journal template.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the warehouse journal template.

fields.name: Test Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the test report that is printed when you click Registering, Test Report.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the page that is used to show the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Registering Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the registering report that is printed when you click Registering, Register and Print.

fields.name: Force Registering Report
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a registering report is printed automatically when you register entries from the journal.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction the warehouse journal template is being used for.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Test Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the test report that is printed when you click Registering, Test Report.

fields.name: Page Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the displayed name of the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Registering Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report that is printed when you click Registering, Register and Print.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Registering No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign document numbers to the warehouse entries that are registered from this journal.

fields.name: Increment Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies if batch names using this template are automatically incremented. Example: The posting following BATCH001 is automatically named BATCH002.
